basic_details.job_title: DCPU Gopalganj Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Nurse, Chowkidar and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Gopalganj (DCPU Gopalganj)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Gopalganj (DCPU Gopalganj) has published the Various Contractual Posts Notification 2026 on the official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 11 Various Contractual Posts positions including Manager/Coordinator, Social Worker-cum-Early Childhood Educator, Nurse, Doctor, Ayah, and Chowkidar posts. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 42 years and holding qualifications such as 8th Pass, Graduate, MBBS, or GNM/Bachelor in Nursing are eligible to apply through email at gopalganj.nic.in. The application process will be active until 02 June 2026, and candid

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: UR Male: 37 years, UR Female: 40 years, BC/EBC Male & Female: 40 years, SC Male & Female: 42 years. Additional age relaxation equivalent to service period for incumbents in child protection institutions.

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, Graduate, MBBS, GNM/Bachelor in Nursing
qualification.details: Manager/Coordinator: Graduate in Social work/sociology/Psychology/Child Development/Human Right Public Administration/Psychiatry/Law/Public Health from a recognized University & Diploma in computer Application. At least 2 years of working experience in Child/Women related Programme. Social worker-cum-Early Childhood Educator: Graduate in social work/Psychology/Law. At least 01 years of working experience in Project like JJ Act, POCSO, Child Labour, Human Trafficking, Drug Abuse, Legal Assistance, Child Marriage, Primary Education. Nurse: Intermediate with G.N.M./Bachelor degree in Nursing from a Government/Indian Nursing Council recognized Nursing Institution. A Minimum of 1 year experience in a hospital/Health facility. Doctor (Part time): MBBS (Child Specialist). On Referral. Ayah: 08th Pass Chowkidar: 08th Pass

selection_process: Initial Merit List based on Academic Qualification (60 marks) Interview (40 marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Gopalganj Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Gopalganj Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DCPU Gopalganj Recruitment 2026 is 02-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DCPU Gopalganj Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for various contractual posts in the District Child Protection Unit Gopalganj for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years for all the posts, with provisions for age relaxation as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications range from 8th Pass to Graduate, MBBS, and GNM/Bachelor in Nursing, depending on the specific post applied for.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for DCPU Gopalganj Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial merit list based on academic qualifications (60 marks) followed by an interview (40 marks).

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply for these contractual posts by sending their complete application and required documents via email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 7,944/- to Rs. 23,170/- per month, varying based on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any work experience required for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, some posts require relevant work experience, such as 2 years for Manager/Coordinator and 1 year for Social worker-cum-Early Childhood Educator and Nurse.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
